chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 393 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.11.2023 Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. No intimation is received. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
